title: Croatian Pork Hash with Spicy Crunch
description: A flavorful and spicy breakfast dish packed with crispy hash browns and savory pork.
instructions: In a large skillet, cook the pork shoulder over medium-high heat until browned on all sides and cooked through.
Remove the pork from the skillet and let it rest.
In the same skillet, add the hash browns and cook until crispy and golden brown.
Add the sliced peppers and chopped onion to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are softened.
Add the minced garlic to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Slice the rested pork into thin strips and add it to the skillet.
Season the mixture with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and serve hot.
Garnish with additional hash browns and spicy peppers if desired.
